reviews.comment:
Excelente!
Lindo y tranquilo lugar para comer y trabajar.
Baños normalmente limpios, wifi, reciben tarjetas y todos los medios de pago.
Precios un poco excesivos en el Servicompras (bar)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!
A nice, quiet place to eat and work.
Bathrooms are usually clean, they have Wi-Fi, and they accept cards and all forms of payment.
Prices at the convenience store (concession stand) are a bit high.
